nasb.text: Then Jeremiah spoke to all the officials and to all the people, saying, “The Lord sent me to prophesy against this house and against this city all the words that you have heard.

esv.text: Then Jeremiah spoke to all the officials and all the people, saying, “The Lord sent me to prophesy against this house and this city all the words you have heard.

cnv.text: 耶利米對眾領袖和眾民說：“耶和華差遣我預言你們所聽見，一切攻擊這殿和這城的話。

ccb.text: 耶利米对官员和民众说：“你们刚才听见的这些关于这殿和这城的预言都是耶和华差我说的。
